summary: Decent recording captured with Beyer M88 mics, but reviews focus on thumbnail controversy rather than musical performance.
review: The few available comments note that the audio was recorded with high‑quality Beyer M88 microphones and sounds reasonably clear. However, reviewers are preoccupied with a news‑article thumbnail about Billy K and an onstage incident, offering little insight into the actual show’s musical merit.

ai_rating.rationale: Only three brief reviews, most of which discuss non‑musical issues; a single positive note on recording quality yields an average rating.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Recorded with Beyer M88 microphones; reviewers describe the sound as rather good and clear, though no detailed mix comments are provided.

show_quality.setlist_flow: No information on setlist or performance flow was given in the reviews.
